The purest poachers EVER?

Forget your fancy dribblers, let's talk about the absolute kings of the box: Ruud van Nistelrooy vs. Pippo Inzaghi!

RVN was an insane goal machine for United and Real, netting 150 goals in 219 games for the Red Devils. Clinical. Lethal. But Inzaghi? He might've made defenders scream, but the man scored in TWO Champions League finals for Milan! Always in the right place, pure instinct.

Who truly had the nastier knack for finding the net when it mattered most?
